<style>
/* Inferno glow on chart canvases */
.uplot canvas {
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(252, 165, 10, 0.6))
          drop-shadow(0 0 14px rgba(188, 55, 84, 0.4))
          drop-shadow(0 0 24px rgba(106, 23, 110, 0.3));
}
/* Darker panel backgrounds for contrast */
.react-grid-item > div { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) !important; }
</style>
